description: Detects command injection risks in C: system() and popen() calls with dynamic arguments. Simplified from Rust: flags all call_expression nodes (cannot filter by function name or check whether argument is a string literal without #match? predicate support). Simplified per D-07: sprintf+system two-phase pattern not expressible in single match_pattern.

flag.message: Function call detected -- verify system() and popen() calls do not receive dynamic or user-controlled arguments to prevent command injection
